name: file_registry_frontend
description: Static admin UI for the file_registry canister. Files in dist/ are deployed as-is. The dist/dfinity.js bundle is pre-built (see scripts/build-dfinity-bundle.sh) and checked into the repo so dfx deploy stays trivial — re-run that script when the @dfinity/* deps need bumping.

scripts.build: echo 'no build needed (dist/ is shipped as-is); see scripts/build-dfinity-bundle.sh to regenerate dfinity.js'
